General.Name: Lerado Financial Group Company Limited
General.Description: Lerado Financial Group Company Limited, an investment holding company, provides financial services in Hong Kong, Europe, the United States, the People's Republic of China, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Medical Products and Plastic Toys Business; Securities Brokerage Business and Asset Management Services; Money Lending Business and Other Financial Services. The company manufactures and distributes plastic toys and medical care products, such as mobility aid and other medical equipment; and offers financial services, including securities broking, margin financing, underwriting and placements, asset management, and money lending services, as well as loan services. It also manufactures and trades in nursery products; and provides insurance brokerage services. In addition, the company engages in the research and development of electric scooters and wheels; and property holding business. The company was formerly known as Lerado Group (Holding) Company Limited and changed its name to Lerado Financial Group Company Limited in March 2016. Lerado Financial Group Company Limited was founded in 1988 and is based in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Golden Sun Centre, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
